name: com.tnbao91.nobody.zero
description: Opinionated Unity 6 LTS template for hybrid casual / puzzle games. Reflex DI, UniTask, R3, LitMotion. ~28 services with mock-first defaults; peer Gameplay/UI/Meta layers cross-talk via IEventBus.

samples.description: Reference Bootstrap.unity, ZeroSecrets.asset.example, ReflexSettings.asset, and packages.config (NuGet manifest for BCL transitive deps).

AI agent context bundle: CLAUDE.md, claude-context/ cheatsheets (architecture, available services, extension points, stack constraints, pitfalls), and .claude/settings.example.json. Move to your repo root after import to give Claude Code session-start context.
